transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Gary Mitchell?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, who's calling?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Gary, this is Sam from Cool Air Services. We're calling about scheduling an HVAC maintenance visit. Is that something you'd be interested in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: How much does it cost?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The standard maintenance visit is $89.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's a bit more than I was expecting. Our last service company only charged us $60.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand. That's our standard rate.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I think I'll just go with them again then. Thanks anyway.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Have a good day.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Linda Carter?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, this is Linda.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Linda! Sam here from Cool Air Services. We're offering HVAC maintenance visits this season. Interested?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: My AC hasn't been cooling as well as it used to lately. How much for a service call?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: The maintenance visit is $89.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: And what exactly does that include?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It includes a full inspection and tune-up of your system.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I've seen companies advertising similar services for around $59. Is there any flexibility on the price?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's our set price unfortunately. I can't go lower.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Hmm. I'll probably just shop around a bit more then.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Okay, no problem. Let us know if you change your mind.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Frank Russo?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Frank, Sam from Cool Air Services. We're scheduling HVAC maintenance appointments for the summer. Can I get you on the calendar?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: What's the cost on that?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's $89 for the standard visit.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Is there any kind of seasonal discount? A lot of companies are running promotions right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We don't currently have any promotions running.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I might be able to get a better deal elsewhere then. Can I think about it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, take your time.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, I'll give you a call back if I decide to go with you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Nancy Brown?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Nancy! Sam from Cool Air Services. Looking to get your AC serviced before the heat really kicks in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, definitely. Oh and my old thermostat has been acting up too — sometimes it doesn't respond right. I've been meaning to get that looked at.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it. What type of AC system do you have?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Central air, it's about 8 years old. Haven't had it serviced in two years.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sounds like it's due for a checkup. The visit is $89. I can get you in Tuesday at 10am or Thursday at 2pm.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Tuesday at 10 works.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, Tuesday at 10am it is! You'll get a confirmation shortly.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Perfect, thank you!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, is this Doug Spencer?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, this is Doug.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Doug! Sam from Cool Air Services. Scheduling HVAC maintenance. Interested in getting your unit serviced?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, we actually have two units — one for each floor. The downstairs one is the priority but the upstairs has been running a bit louder than usual.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Understood. The maintenance visit is $89. I have openings Wednesday at 11am or Friday at 3pm.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Wednesday at 11 works.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Booked for Wednesday at 11! We'll take a look at the downstairs unit for you.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sounds good. And you'll just let me know if the upstairs one also needs something?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, we can take a look while we're there.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Rita Coleman?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Rita, Sam from Cool Air Services. We're scheduling summer maintenance appointments. Can I get your AC serviced?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, please. We've also been worried about the air quality indoors. My daughter has allergies and it's been bad this season.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm sorry to hear that. What type of system do you have and when was it last serviced?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Central air, about 6 years old. I don't think it's been serviced in three years.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Definitely overdue. The maintenance visit is $89. I have Thursday at 1pm or Saturday at 9am.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thursday at 1 works for me.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thursday at 1pm, all set! We'll get that system tuned up for you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Sam from Cool Air Services. Am I speaking with Andrew Hughes?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah. What's this about?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Andrew! We're scheduling HVAC maintenance appointments. The visit is $89 and I have some openings this week.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: $89? Let me check with my wife about the budget first. I'll call you back.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, no problem.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Brenda Walsh?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Brenda! Sam from Cool Air Services. We're doing HVAC maintenance visits. Can I get you scheduled?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Maybe. What does the visit cover exactly?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's a full tune-up and inspection. $89 for the visit. I have Monday or Wednesday available.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, but what brand is my unit? You should probably know that before coming out right?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We service all major brands. Monday at 2pm or Wednesday at 11am?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: How old is it though? Does that matter for the service?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Age can be relevant but we'll assess when we arrive.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I feel like you should ask me these things before booking. I'll think about it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, this is Sam from Cool Air Services. Is this Marcus Webb?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah. Good timing — my AC is actually completely out right now.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Oh no, I'm sorry to hear that. Is it not turning on at all or is it running but not cooling?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: It's running but there's a burning smell and it stopped blowing cold air completely. Also noticed some ice around the outside unit.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That sounds like it could be a refrigerant issue but I don't want to say for sure. We'd need someone to take a look.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: This sounds serious. Can you get someone out today? It's 85 degrees in here and I have elderly parents at home.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand the urgency. I'll need to escalate this to our dispatch team for an emergency visit — that's outside what I can schedule on this call.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: How long is that going to take?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'm connecting you with dispatch now. They'll be able to give you an ETA. Please hold for just a moment.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Carol Jenkins?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Carol! Sam from Cool Air Services. We're scheduling summer HVAC maintenance. Is this something you'd be interested in?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Probably, yes. My unit is a few years old and I haven't had it serviced in a while.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good that you're thinking ahead! Can I ask — is it a central air system, a heat pump, or a mini-split? And roughly how old is it?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Central air. I think it's about 7 years old. Installed the year we moved in.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good to know. At 7 years it's definitely worth staying on top of maintenance to keep it running efficiently. The visit is $89. I'd also mention — if you want year-round coverage, our annual plan is $149 and covers two visits a year, which works out to a much better value.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Oh, the annual plan sounds smarter actually. Let's do that.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great choice! I have Tuesday at 2pm or Friday at 10am for the first visit. Which works?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Friday at 10 would be perfect.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Friday at 10am, confirmed! I'll set you up on the annual plan and send over the details. Thanks Carol!
